title: ImUi Edit Lifecycle Hardening v1
problem: The previous diagnostics follow-on proved the first edit lifecycle gates, but value-editing still needs a Dear ImGui-aligned hardening pass for slider, drag-value, and numeric/text entry session semantics. This lane owns private IMUI lifecycle internals, editor control proof, and diagnostics coverage without widening `crates/fret-ui`, `fret-authoring::Response`, or public `fret-imui` contracts by default.

repro.summary: Start with the existing unit and diagnostics floors for slider/text lifecycle, then add drag-value and numeric-input proof as the lane lands slices.
commands: cargo nextest run -p fret-node --features compat-retained-canvas portal_text_input_ --jobs 2
cargo nextest run -p fret-node --features compat-retained-canvas portal_button_stack_height --jobs 2
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-response-signals-input-bounds-stability.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-editor-proof-numeric-input-validation.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-editor-proof-numeric-input-escape-cancel.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-response-signals-edit-lifecycle --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-editor-proof-edit-outcomes --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

gates.name: node-portal-input-unit
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-node --features compat-retained-canvas portal_text_input_ --jobs 2

gates.name: node-portal-button-stack-unit
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-node --features compat-retained-canvas portal_button_stack_height --jobs 2

gates.name: response-input-bounds-script
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-response-signals-input-bounds-stability.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo

gates.name: editor-proof-numeric-validation-script
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-editor-proof-numeric-input-validation.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

gates.name: editor-proof-numeric-escape-cancel-script
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/imui/imui-editor-proof-numeric-input-escape-cancel.json --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

gates.name: diag-registry-check
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag registry check

gates.name: response-lifecycle-suite
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-response-signals-edit-lifecycle --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo

gates.name: editor-proof-suite
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-editor-proof-edit-outcomes --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

continue_policy.notes: Continue this lane for bounded slider/drag-value/numeric/text edit lifecycle hardening. Start a narrower follow-on if the work turns into public runtime API, key ownership, docking, or broad editor workbench scope.
